dataset: Grand Theft Auto V (GTAV) via OpenCAD game data

pi_items.source: https://gta.fandom.com/wiki/Vigero - Declasse is a confirmed vehicle manufacturer in GTA V. The Vigero is a muscle car made by Declasse.
https://gta.fandom.com/wiki/Vigero - The Vigero is a muscle car featured in GTA V, based on the Chevrolet Camaro. Real-world inspections of multiple GTA wikis confirm this vehicle exists in-game.
Task file specification. XKCD is a reference to the webcomic, and 420 is a common joke number used in test data. This is a fictional test plate number.
https://gta.fandom.com/wiki/Vehicle_Customization_in_GTA_V/Respray_Colors - Black is one of the 223 standard vehicle colors available in GTA V.
GTA V commonly features armed robbery as a crime type and mission objective. This is authentic GTA V terminology.
https://gta.fandom.com/wiki/Fleeca - Fleeca is a real bank brand in GTA V with multiple branch locations across San Andreas, including one on Hawick Avenue in Alta.
GTA V police descriptions commonly use 'armed and dangerous' terminology. This is authentic GTA V police CAD language.

https://gta.fandom.com/wiki/Vinewood_Boulevard_(HD_Universe) - Vinewood Boulevard is a major east-west avenue in Downtown Vinewood, Los Santos, GTA V. It is based on Hollywood Boulevard in Los Angeles.

pi_items.metadata_value: Hawick Avenue (in context of Fleeca Bank robbery)
pi_items.source: https://gta-xtreme.com/en/fleeca-bank-gta-5-location - One of the real Fleeca Bank locations in GTA V is at 'Hawick Avenue and Meteor Street, Alta'. The task correctly identifies this location.

https://gta.fandom.com/wiki/Vinewood_Boulevard_(HD_Universe) - Eclipse Boulevard is a real street in GTA V that intersects with Vinewood Boulevard. The task's reference to 'Vinewood Boulevard near Eclipse Boulevard' is geographically accurate.

privileged_info_summary: All metadata values refer to authentic Grand Theft Auto V game world entities: Declasse is a confirmed vehicle manufacturer in GTA V; the Vigero is a real GTA V muscle car; Black is a standard GTA V vehicle color; Fleeca Bank is a real GTA V bank with a location on Hawick Avenue in Alta; Vinewood Boulevard is a major GTA V street in Downtown Vinewood; Eclipse Boulevard is a real GTA V street that intersects Vinewood Boulevard; armed robbery and armed and dangerous are authentic GTA V crime descriptions. The plate number XKCD420 is a fictional test identifier combining a webcomic reference with a joke number. All data is synthetic (from GTA V game data), not from real-world sources.
